content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/prisma/schema.prisma:1	generator client {2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"3	}4	5	datasource db {6	  provider = "sqlite"7	  url      = "file:./dev.db"8	}9	10	model User {11	  id            String    @id @default(cuid())12	  name          String?13	  email         String?   @unique14	  password      String?15	  role          String    @default("USER")16	  restaurants   Restaurant[]17	  orders        Order[]18	}19	20	model Restaurant {21	  id          String     @id @default(cuid())22	  name        String23	  description String?24	  ownerId     String25	  owner       User       @relation(fields: [ownerId], references: [id])26	  menuItems   MenuItem[]27	  orders      Order[]28	}29	30	model MenuItem {31	  id           String     @id @default(cuid())32	  name         String33	  description  String?34	  price        Float35	  restaurantId String36	  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])37	  orderItems   OrderItem[]38	}39	40	model Order {41	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())42	  status       String      @default("PENDING")43	  total        Float44	  userId       String45	  user         User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])46	  restaurantId String47	  restaurant   Restaurant  @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])48	  items        OrderItem[]49	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())50	}51	52	model OrderItem {53	  id         String   @id @default(cuid())54	  quantity   Int55	  orderId    String56	  order      Order    @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])57	  menuItemId String58	  menuItem   MenuItem @relation(fields: [menuItemId], references: [id])59	}
